title: stelis arbuscula
intro: Stelis arbuscula, also known as the tree orchid, is a type of orchid that grows in the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Stelis arbuscula include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Stelis arbuscula is often used as a tea or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties, and it can also be applied topically to affected areas.
